defect_issues.name: Water Stain on Ceiling
defect_issues.description: Visible brown or dark discoloration on the ceiling that suggests past or active moisture intrusion.

defect_issues.name: Peeling or Discolored Paint
defect_issues.description: Paint that is peeling, bubbling, cracked, or visibly aged.

defect_issues.name: Visible Mold or Mildew
defect_issues.description: Dark, fuzzy, or patchy growth on surfaces indicative of active or past moisture problems.

defect_issues.name: Drywall Damage or Cracks
defect_issues.description: Cracks, holes, nail pops, or uneven drywall that may indicate settling, impact damage, or poor repairs.

defect_issues.name: Ceiling Cracks or Sagging
defect_issues.description: Noticeable cracks, separation at joints, or sagging areas in the ceiling that may indicate structural movement or moisture damage.

defect_issues.name: Worn or Stained Carpet
defect_issues.description: Carpet that is visibly dirty, stained, frayed, or heavily worn.

defect_issues.name: Scratched or Damaged Hard Flooring
defect_issues.description: Hardwood, laminate, vinyl, or tile flooring with scratches, chips, warping, broken tiles, or other visible damage.

defect_issues.name: Trip Hazard or Unlevel Floor
defect_issues.description: Visibly uneven flooring, loose thresholds, or abrupt height changes that may pose a tripping risk or suggest settlement.

defect_issues.name: Damaged or Rotted Exterior Siding/Trim
defect_issues.description: Exterior wood or siding showing visible rot, warping, cracks, missing sections, or advanced deterioration.

defect_issues.name: Damaged or Aged Roof Shingles
defect_issues.description: Missing, curling, patchy, or visibly deteriorated roof shingles visible from the photo.

defect_issues.name: Damaged or Unsafe Deck/Porch
defect_issues.description: Deck, porch, or exterior stairs with loose, rotted, or missing boards or railings that appear unsafe or in poor condition.

defect_issues.name: Broken or Fogged Windows
defect_issues.description: Cracked glass, damaged frames, missing panes, or fogged double-pane windows indicating failed seals.

defect_issues.name: Damaged or Outdated Cabinets
defect_issues.description: Kitchen or bathroom cabinets with visible wear, damaged doors or drawers, water staining, or visibly dated style.

defect_issues.name: Damaged Countertops
defect_issues.description: Countertops with visible burns, chips, cracks, swollen seams, or missing sections.

defect_issues.name: Damaged Tile or Grout
defect_issues.description: Broken, loose, or missing tiles or grout in kitchens, bathrooms, or flooring that may allow moisture intrusion.

defect_issues.name: Appliance Damage or Missing
defect_issues.description: Key built-in appliances (range, oven, dishwasher, built-in microwave) missing, visibly broken, or significantly aged or neglected.

defect_issues.name: Leaking or Stained Plumbing Fixtures
defect_issues.description: Visible leaks, corrosion, water staining, or heavy mineral buildup at sinks, toilets, tubs, or showers.

defect_issues.name: Stained or Damaged Bath Fixtures
defect_issues.description: Tubs, showers, or toilets with heavy staining, chipped enamel, or visibly worn finishes.

defect_issues.name: Visible Electrical Risks
defect_issues.description: Exposed wiring, missing outlet or switch covers, scorch marks, overfilled power strips, or visibly unsafe electrical components.

defect_issues.name: Missing or Damaged Handrails/Guardrails
defect_issues.description: Stairs, balconies, or decks lacking proper handrails or guardrails, or having visibly loose or broken railings.

defect_issues.name: Basement or Garage Damage
defect_issues.description: Visible cracking, moisture intrusion, efflorescence, or structural wear in garage or basement walls or floors.

defect_issues.name: Major Foundation or Settlement Signs
defect_issues.description: Large step cracks in masonry, significantly sloped floors, misaligned doors or windows, or other clear indications of notable settlement.

defect_issues.name: Visible Pest or Rodent Evidence
defect_issues.description: Visible droppings, chewed materials, nests, or other clear signs of insects or rodents.

defect_issues.name: Standing Water or Poor Grading
defect_issues.description: Visible standing water near the home, obvious negative grading toward the structure, or saturated soil that may promote moisture intrusion.

opportunity_flags.name: Outdated Kitchen Finishes
opportunity_flags.description: Older cabinetry, countertops, appliances, or finishes that would benefit from modernization and could significantly improve value.

opportunity_flags.name: Outdated Bathroom Finishes
opportunity_flags.description: Older tile, vanity, fixtures, or layout indicating that an update would noticeably improve appeal and value.

opportunity_flags.name: Outdated Flooring Style
opportunity_flags.description: Flooring that is clean but visually outdated (older carpet, laminate, linoleum, or tile colors or patterns).

opportunity_flags.name: Outdated Lighting Fixtures
opportunity_flags.description: Older style ceiling lights, fans, sconces, or track lighting where modern fixtures would improve the look.

opportunity_flags.name: Paint Refresh Opportunity
opportunity_flags.description: Photo suggests an older or highly personalized color scheme where repainting in modern neutrals would improve appeal.

opportunity_flags.name: Landscape Improvement
opportunity_flags.description: Exterior or yard appears sparse, overgrown, or tired and could be visually improved with fresh landscaping or cleanup.

opportunity_flags.name: Curb Appeal Upgrade
opportunity_flags.description: Front entry, porch, or facade could benefit from cosmetic updates (paint, door hardware, simple accents) to improve first impressions.

opportunity_flags.name: Energy Efficiency Improvements
opportunity_flags.description: Older windows, lighting, HVAC equipment, or appliances suggest potential for cost-saving energy efficiency upgrades.

opportunity_flags.name: Unfinished Basement
opportunity_flags.description: Unfinished basement suggests a meaningful opportunity for added living space or storage through future finishing.

opportunity_flags.name: Staging or Decluttering Opportunity
opportunity_flags.description: Rooms appear cluttered, cramped, or heavily personalized; decluttering or staging would likely improve photos and buyer perception.
